name: Firecrackers
recipeInstructions:
1. Sift together cayenne pepper, salt, and flour.
2. In a separate bowl, cream the butter and grated cheddar cheese until smooth.
3. Gradually add the flour mixture to the butter mixture, mixing thoroughly.
4. Add the chopped pecans and mix well.
5. Divide the dough into two equal portions.
6. Roll each portion into logs measuring approximately 1 1/2 inches in diameter and 8 inches in length.
7. Wrap each log in plastic wrap and refrigerate for up to two weeks or freeze for up to six months.
8. To serve, preheat the oven to 350°F (175°C).
9. Grease baking sheets with butter.
10. Using a sharp knife, slice the logs into 1/4 inch thick slices.
11. Arrange the slices on the prepared baking sheets about half an inch apart.
12. Bake for 15 to 20 minutes or until lightly golden brown.
13. Remove from the sheets and allow to cool completely before serving.
14. Store in airtight containers. These are delicious served with soups or as hors d'oeuvres.
